Homepage.Title: KHU Rhyming Dict.
Homepage.Brief:
Kài Hó Ūn is a Taiwanese rhyming dictionary
It's a tool that allows us to look up rhyming words.
It can help you with writing songs, poetry, or any Taiwanese literary work that requires rhymes!

DataSource.Title: Data Source
DataSource.POJFonts: aiongg/POJFonts - Fonts for POJ that improved by A Ióng

Tutorial.Title: How to Use
Tutorial.Brief: Put the cursor on any component to show the description of it.

Tooltip.SearchBar: Enter a word or syllable here, then click the button to search for rhyming words.
Tooltip.IgnoreNasalSound: When selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword, ignoring they are nasal or not. Take "soaⁿ" and "soa" as an example, it will be consider as a rhyming pair of words.
Tooltip.SimilarVowel: When selected, it will search all the words with similar vowel(s).
Tooltip.IgnoreFinalSound: When selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword, ignoring the final sound (coda).
Tooltip.SameArticulationPart: When selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword, as long as they have the same part of articulation. Take "sin" and "si̍t" as an example, it will be consider as a rhyming pair of words.
Tooltip.SameTone: When selected, it will filter the words that have different tone. Take "ah ūn" and "phah phún" as an example, it will no longer consider as rhymed word because they have different tone.

Default.Title: Default
Default.Content: When no option is being selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword. (both the vowel and the final sound).

IgnoreFinalSound.Title: Ignore Final Sound
IgnoreFinalSound.Content: When selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword, ignoring the final sound (coda).

SameTone.Title: Same Tone
SameTone.Content: When selected, it will filter the words that have different tone. Take "ah ūn" and "phah phún" as an example, it will no longer consider as rhymed word because they have different tone.

NasalSound.Title: Nasal Sound
NasalSound.Content: When selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword, ignoring they are nasal or not. Take "soaⁿ" and "soa" as an example, it will be consider as a rhyming pair of words.

SameArticulationPart.Title: Same Part of Articulation
SameArticulationPart.Content: When selected, it will search all the words that rhyming with the keyword, as long as they have the same part of articulation. Take "sin" and "si̍t" as an example, it will be consider as a rhyming pair of words.

SimilarVowel.Title: Similar Vowel
SimilarVowel.Content: When selected, it will search all the words with similar vowel(s).

Contact.Title: CONTACT US
Contact.Content: If there's any opinion for Kài Hó Ūn Rhyming Dictionary, comment here to let us know! We will send you a e-mail when we received your opinion.

OpinionTitle.Title: Title
OpinionTitle.Placeholder: Enter the title for your opinion

NotFound.Title: Announcement not found
NotFound.Brief: Can't find the announcement, please check the number of the announcement or contact the developer.

ErrorMessage.Empty: The search area can not be empty.

Homepage.Label: Let's hit the rhymes
Homepage.Placeholder: Enter the syllable or word you want to rhyme

Registration.lack_of_field: Please fill in all the required fields.
Registration.password_length_error: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Registration.nickname_length_error: Nickname must be between 2 and 20 characters long.
Registration.email_format_error: Please enter a valid email address.
Registration.email_exists_error: An account with this email already exists. Please use a different email address.

Registration.registration_failed: Registration failed due to an error. Please try again later or contact the administrator if the problem persists.
